description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a yellow mesh upper with black and white synthetic overlays for structural support. The shoe has a visibly cushioned midsole and a textured, multi-material outsole designed for traction. The laces are standard and appear slightly frayed, indicating regular use. The interior lining is light gray and shows some signs of wear, particularly around the heel collar. The side of the shoe displays a distinctive, bold logo pattern in black and white. The overall appearance suggests a well-ventilated, performance-oriented design suitable for urban running or walking.
description: A yellow athletic running shoe with black and white overlays, mesh upper, and visible signs of wear, featuring a cushioned sole and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow mesh upper, black and white overlays, and prominent logo design.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel structure, mesh ventilation, and the back of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar mesh and overlay details, and visible lacing.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the toe box, lacing system, and mesh ventilation.
attribute_logo: Large stylized 'A' logo in black and white on both sides of the shoe.
